description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on published releases, a scheduled cron job, workflow dispatch, and completed Build workflow runs on master or stable branches. The workflow has two jobs: update-autorevision and update-archive, both running on ubuntu-22.04. The update-autorevision job checks out the repository, ensures no unstaged changes, generates AutoRevision.txt, finds the target branch, and creates a pull request with the updates. The update-archive job checks out the repository, generates AutoRevision.txt, creates a build directory, and creates and uploads tar.gz and zip archives with SHA256 checksums to the release.
